text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
When I saw the winner's face, I was really struck
by how radiant she looked in her moment of
victory...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I love seeing everyone's smiles, but... it's
disappointing only being able to see them
without getting to smile myself...
choice_data_list: Next time, people are going to be seeing you smile!
Let's work hard, so we'll be the ones grinning!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
choice_data_list: We can put a battle plan together after eating.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work real hard after my stomach's
nice and full!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, okay. You're right. I'm going to do
everything I can so we can smile too next time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, no more moping! Here's to getting even
stronger!
